revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Clarify_span%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{nosubst}} {{template shortcut|clarifyspan|clarify-span}} == Usage == The {{tl|clarify span}} template may be used when there is text that needs further explanation or clarification. Unlike the template {{tl|clarify}}, this template attaches explicitly to a portion of text, for example one or more specific sentences, by surrounding the text with the template. This is especially useful for flagging ''multiple facts'' or multiple sentences as needing clarification, and for singling out ''a specific unclear fact'' among many. Once the passage is clarified, please remove this template from the surrounded text. :
{{tlx|clarify span|text{{=}}Passage(s) needing clarification|explain{{=}}Reason for the needed clarification|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}
The date and explain parameters are optional. The parameter names for {{para|text}} and {{para|explain}} can be omitted, as long as the text is in the first position, and the explanation is in the second. Therefore, the minimal syntax is: :
{{tlx|clarify span|Passage(s) needing clarification}}
'''Example of usage:''' ::: ... the treaty. {{tlx|clarify span|One of the terms|explain{{=}}which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... :produces: ::: ... the treaty. {{clarify span|One of the terms|reason=which one?}} of the treaty of Versailles led to ... === Parameters === There are three parameters to the template: ;{{para|text}}:The text needing clarification. This parameter is mandatory. ;{{para|explain}}:Specifics explaining the clarification that is needed. If omitted, "This passage needs to be better explained" will be used. This text is shown as a [[:en:Tooltip|Tooltip]]. ;{{para|date}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}:Adds month & year to the category, as well as helping identify how long ago the template was added. If omitted, a bot will eventually add it for you. == Categorization of articles == Adding this template to an article places the article into the hidden categories [[:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing clarification]] and [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "aliases": [ "text" ], "label": "text needing clarification", "description": "The text needing clarification", "example": "a vague sentence fragment", "type": "unbalanced-wikitext", "required": true }, "2": { "aliases": [ "reason", "explain" ], "label": "Reason", "description": "An explanation as to why the text needs to be clarified", "example": "It's unclear what \"Green Army\" means for unfamiliar readers" }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } } } == See also == * {{Tl|Clarify}} — detailed information on the usage of this and similar templates {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Coherency templates]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
